---
title: "Research supervision"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Research supervision | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Current, completed and recorded research supervision by Dr Mesfin Genie."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Research supervision</p><h1>Supervising health economics and applied policy research</h1><p class="lead">Principal supervision means leading the supervision team. Co-supervision means contributing specialist expertise within the supervisory panel.</p></div></header><section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell"><h2>Current supervision</h2><div class="grid-2"><article class="supervision-card"><div class="meta">Doctor of Philosophy · Co-Supervisor</div><h3>Economic Analysis of the Impact of Climate Change on the Agricultural Sector in the Solomon Islands</h3><p>Expected 31 December 2028</p></article><article class="supervision-card"><div class="meta">Doctor of Philosophy · Co-Supervisor</div><h3>Economic modelling of the impact of novel approaches for crop drought resilience using long-term trials in Australia</h3><p>Current</p></article><article class="supervision-card"><div class="meta">Doctor of Philosophy · Co-Supervisor</div><h3>Gendered Ageism in the Workplace: Menopause and Female Labour Market Participation</h3><p>Current</p></article><article class="supervision-card"><div class="meta">Doctor of Philosophy · Principal Supervisor</div><h3>Understanding the Drivers of Telehealth Usage among Patients in Australia and How It Reduces Costs Relative to In-Person Healthcare Services</h3><p>Current</p></article></div><h2>Completed supervision</h2><div class="grid-2"><article class="supervision-card"><div class="meta">Doctor of Philosophy · Co-Supervisor</div><h3>Health Systems Reform Dynamics: Implications for Equity and Efficiency</h3><p>Completed 13 March 2025</p></article></div><h2>Recorded supervision</h2><div class="grid-2"><article class="supervision-card"><div class="meta">Master of Philosophy · Principal Supervisor</div><h3>Socio-economic and Behavioural Impacts of COVID-19 Vaccine Mandates: A Scoping Review</h3><p>Recorded 10 November 2024</p></article><article class="supervision-card"><div class="meta">Master of Philosophy · Principal Supervisor</div><h3>The Socio-economic and Behavioural Impacts of Influenza Vaccine Mandates on Healthcare Workers: A Scoping Review</h3><p>Recorded 10 November 2024</p></article></div><div class="callout"><strong>Prospective students:</strong> Please send a CV, academic transcripts, a short research proposal, and details of research experience and publications where applicable.</div></div></section>
```
